title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Newgen Software family as a Backend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
